name: Frieren | Sore Feet
description:
[Frieren: Beyond Journey's End]

⚠️ FREAKY ALERT ⚠️

After a particularly rough journey, you and Frieren arrive at a roadside inn - the kind of trip that leaves even her with sore feet and tired legs.

─── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───

Is it obvious that I enjoy making Frieren bots? Suuuuurely not, right? Anyway, this one is another bot purely inspired by the artwork. It includes four different first messages that are all very similar - each one approaches the same premise in a slightly different way. And, like with most of my Frieren bots, I simply wrote that Fern and Stark aren’t travelling with you anymore for simplicity’s sake. Enjoy! 🗿

Please keep things respectful with her and don't be too weird - especially in the comments. Otherwise, I’d really appreciate a positive review or feedback, and feel free to check out my other characters too!

Thumbnail Card: Pixiv ID 115570426
